founder_brief.founder_profile: Senior infrastructure engineer building a bootstrapped B2B SaaS

candidates.problem: Small MSPs review firewall policy changes manually and inconsistently.
candidates.target_user: Network engineers at small managed service providers
assumptions: Teams can export sanitized policy snapshots

candidates.problem: Client network documentation becomes stale after routine changes.
candidates.target_user: Operations leads at small managed service providers

selected_opportunity.problem: Small MSPs review firewall policy changes manually and inconsistently.
selected_opportunity.target_user: Network engineers at small managed service providers
selected_opportunity.rationale: Strong founder fit, bounded local inputs, and a twelve-week deterministic MVP path.
